intent_summary: Build Field Monitor sub-hub integrations for Talent Flow (People) and Signal Sweep (Blog). Production deploy COMPLETE — 4 Workers live on svg-outreach.workers.dev, smoke test 7/7 PASS. CRITICAL: Parser format changed during deploy — new Function() blocked by Workers runtime, parser-registry refactored to regex-based ParserConfig JSON model. Seed scripts must use NEW format. Build sequence: (1) Talent Flow first — update seed_linkedin_parsers.py to ParserConfig JSON, build linkedin_monitor.py bridge, seed 100 LinkedIn URLs, verify bridge reads check_log and fires EVENT_TALENTFLOW_MOVE. (2) Signal Sweep second — same pattern for Blog sub-hub, seed 100 press/about URLs from vendor.blog, build change_bridge.py, verify bridge feeds into ingest_article(). Sample gate: 100 records each.

parser_config_format.note: NEW FORMAT — old fn_body format is dead

constraints: Do not expand scope beyond sub-hub integration files
Parser seed scripts MUST use ParserConfig JSON format — NOT old fn_body format
Do not modify existing movement_engine.py, state_machine.py, movement_rules.py
Do not modify existing blog_node_spoke.py, ingest_article.py, classify_event.py, emit_bit_signal.py
field_monitor.* is vendor tier — bridge modules READ only, never write
Seed source for Signal Sweep is vendor.blog (NOT dropped company.company_source_urls)
Build Talent Flow first, validate, then Signal Sweep
Kill switches: KILL_TALENT_FLOW_MONITOR, KILL_LINKEDIN_SEED, KILL_SIGNAL_SWEEP, KILL_BLOG_URL_SEED
